title: Neural Roto Assistant
description: A Python script integrated into Nuke that automates rotoscoping of complex hair using PyTorch models. It reduces manual labor by 60%.

title: Custom VEX Fluid Solver
description:
Our new fluid solver is essentially the Marie Kondo of Houdini—it thanks your cache for its service, then lovingly deletes 40% of it without anyone asking questions.

Finally, a tool that respects your hard drive’s boundaries more than your last relationship.

Visual fidelity remains so intact that your supervisor will still blame you for the fire being “too fire-y,” but at least they can’t blame the cache size.

...

title: Auto-Lighting Pipeline
description: Machine learning model that analyzes 3D scenes and suggests optimal HDRI lighting setups based on reference photos.
